variants: Sonya Parfit was raised in Eagleforge Downs, cultivating a deep-rooted sense of community spirit. She attended the Timberclad Institute for her education, where she honed her skills, particularly her proficiency in the Thai script. Following her studies, Sonya joined Yieldtide Ventures and began applying her knowledge professionally. Alongside her career, she dedicates a portion of her time to the Wildflower Community Project, engaging in efforts to promote environmental wellness. Through her blend of professional expertise and volunteer work, Sonya actively contributes to the betterment of her community.
